---
title: "Tasks and Params"
---

## Task Types

A task must define exactly one of:

- `cmd`
- `steps`
- `run`

## Params

```yaml
tasks:
  build:
    desc: Build
    cmd: go build ./cmd/{{params.target}}
    params:
      target:
        desc: Binary target
        env: TARGET
        required: true
```

Run with direct flags:

```bash
qp build --target api
```

Or with `--param`:

```bash
qp build --param target=api
```

## Positional Params

```yaml
params:
  target:
    env: TARGET
    required: true
    position: 1
  files:
    env: FILES
    position: 2
    variadic: true
```
